sections.title: HTTPRoute ResolvedRefs (now)
sections.query: fetch spans | filter k8s.httproute.resolved_refs == false | summarize count_failed = count(), by:{ k8s.httproute.name, k8s.gateway.name, bin(start_time, 10s) }

sections.title: 5xx rate by HTTPRoute
sections.query: fetch metrics | filter metric.key == "http.server.request.count" and status_code startswith "5" | summarize sum = sum(value), by:{ k8s.httproute.name, bin(timeframe, 30s) }

sections.title: Failed requests — trace drill-in
sections.query: fetch spans | filter k8s.httproute.name == "api" and http.response.status_code >= 500 | sort start_time desc | limit 50

sections.title: Gateway status conditions (emit_status_conditions=true)
sections.query: fetch logs | filter attributes["otel.library.name"] == "gatewayapiprocessor" and attributes["k8s.gateway.status.condition"] != null
